dict.string: Chatforia uses your contacts so you can find and connect with people you know.
Chatforia uses the microphone for voice messages and audio features.
Chatforia uses your photo library so you can select and share images in chats.
Chatforia can save images to your photo library when you choose to download media.
Chatforia uses the camera so you can take profile photos and share images in chats.
